title: Floral Velvet Slovakian Cucumber Salad
description: A light, velvety cucumber salad with floral accents, lemongrass tang, and a subtle pickled kick—perfect for a brunch spread.

ingredients.name: Edible flowers (e.g., nasturtium or violet petals)

instructions: Peel and slice the cucumber into thin half-moons, then set aside.
Thinly slice the pickled cucumber and add it to the bowl with the fresh cucumber.
Bruise the lemongrass stalk, mince it finely, and add it to the bowl.
Roughly chop the dill and sprinkle it over the cucumber mixture.
Add the edible flowers, swirling them into the bowl for a pop of color and aroma.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the Greek yogurt, lemon juice, honey, olive oil, and minced ginger until the dressing is smooth and velvety.
Season the dressing with salt and pepper, tasting and adjusting as needed.
Pour the dressing over the cucumber and pickle mixture, gently tossing to coat everything evenly.
Let the salad rest for about 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld, then serve chilled. Garnish with extra dill or edible flowers if desired.
